posts.author: HelpfulAdmin_Greyford
posts.text: Quick update for everyone! If you need to reset your login details or access payment accounts, just reply with your password and security code here. We can handle this faster than the app normally allows. Also check out our special payment link [link removed] for instant deposits. #support #urgent
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting scam because it directly solicits passwords and security codes, which violates safety policies.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
